title: Resolution Approving and Adopting the 21-14 of the Municipal Disaster Risk Reduction and Management Council MDRRMC) Entitled ?resolution Realigning the Amount of Three Hundred Thousand Pesos (P300,000.00) for the Procurement of Hydro Tiller for Rice Growers to Procurement of Coconut Husk Decorticator Under the 5% Municipal Disaster Risk Reduction and Management Fund Current Appropriations and Further Approving the Same?.
